summary: Tested Team page CMS content display fix: team member images now correctly display from CMS API. Created 18 backend tests and 11 frontend tests specifically for this feature. All 54 backend tests and 54 frontend tests pass.

team_page_cms_content.description: Team page displays team members with images from CMS API
tests: Team page loads and displays team members (Holger & Milena)
Team member images display correctly from CMS (not placeholders)
Team member titles display from CMS data
Returns team page with correct structure (slug, title, sections)
Each member has image path defined

team_member_images_fix.description: Image paths for Holger and Milena are correct and accessible
tests: Frontend displays images without fallback to placeholder

image_upload_api.description: Admin image upload endpoints protected and functional

navigation_to_team.description: Navigation to team page works from header and footer

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing CMS data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team page CMS integration verified. Images display correctly from CMS API. Created test_pages_api.py for backend testing of pages CMS endpoints and team-page.spec.ts for frontend testing.
